title: VSB STB - Factory Reset from Settings
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Internet connection is available. Remote is paired and responsive. Test environment is ready for factory reset validation and required login data is available for onboarding after reset.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar

steps.step: Verify Factory Reset option is visible
steps.expectedResult: Factory Reset option is visible in device settings
Factory reset warning or confirmation screen is displayed
Factory reset is cancelled and user returns to device settings without data being erased
Factory reset warning or confirmation screen is displayed

steps.data: Confirm only in a test environment where reset is allowed

steps.step: Wait for STB to reset and restart
Verify onboarding starts after factory reset
Verify previous user session is removed
steps.expectedResult: User is no longer logged in and login/onboarding is required

steps.step: Pair remote if required after factory reset
steps.data: Hold 7 and 9 at the same time for three seconds if remote pairing screen is shown
steps.expectedResult: Remote pairs successfully or remains paired if pairing is not required

steps.step: Continue onboarding until internet setup or login screen
steps.expectedResult: Onboarding flow continues without blocking errors
